---
title: "Week 6: Functional programming"
---

```{r}
week <- 6
source(here::here("course_info.R"))
```

## Main reference

* [9-11. *Advanced R*](https://adv-r.hadley.nz/fp.html)

## What you will learn this week

* Writing functions
* Manipulating functions
* Function factories
* Functional mapping
* Functional adverbs

## Pre-class activities

* Watch [Intro to Functional Programming with R](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MuOxlUN9q4E)

```{r}
#| output: asis
show_slides(week)
```

* [Code used in workshop](week6/lab.R)
`
```{r}
#| output: asis
show_assignments(week)
```
